name: Hydra's Breath
description: Hydra's Breath is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Armaments.

abilities.name: Miasma
abilities.description: Attacks poison the target, dealing damage over time. Damage per Second: 2.5% of target's Max HP. Duration: 3.

abilities.name: Polycephaly
abilities.description: Ranged Only. Attacks have a chance to fire projectiles at 2 additional targets within a cone in front of the attacker. Does not trigger attack modifiers. Proc Chance: 30%. Search Range Buffer: 150. Bonus Attack Targets: 3. Additional Projectile Damage: 20 + 75% attack damage. Primary Attack Damage Bonus: 20.
